examples.title: Algorithm: Sequential File Access
examples.description: Demonstrates sequential access method for reading records from a file
examples.code:
ALGORITHM SequentialRead
BEGIN
 OPEN file in read mode
 WHILE NOT end_of_file DO
 READ next record
 PROCESS record
 END WHILE
 CLOSE file
END
examples.explanation:
1. Opens file for reading
2. Iterates through records sequentially
3. Processes each record in order
4. Closes file after completion

examples.title: Algorithm: Direct File Access
examples.description: Implements direct access using file positioning
examples.code:
ALGORITHM DirectAccess
BEGIN
 OPEN file in random-access mode
 SEEK_TO position (block_number * block_size)
 READ record
 PROCESS data
 CLOSE file
END
examples.explanation:
1. Opens file with random access capability
2. Uses seek operation to jump directly to block
3. Reads specific record without scanning entire file
4. Processes retrieved data

examples.title: Indexed File Access Implementation
examples.description: Python implementation of indexed access using dictionary
examples.explanation:
1. Maintains index dictionary for key-position mapping
2. add_record stores both index and data
3. get_record uses index for direct access
4. Demonstrates O(1) access time for known keys
